prohibited_materials_before_submission_f: parent verifier source or hidden reference artifacts
parent result counts, digests, counterexamples, or candidate outcomes
contamination_rule: Any verified prohibited exposure before submission freeze excludes the affected submission from primary aggregation. The submission remains reported as contaminated.
uncertain_exposure_rule: Materially uncertain exposure yields inconclusive eligibility until adjudicated; uncertainty is not silently treated as clean.
correction_rule: Corrections must be separately versioned and preserve the original submission unchanged.
